originalTitle: AI-related debt sells off sharply as Amazon looks to borrow another $25 billion
summary: Bonds financing the massive artificial-intelligence buildout were hit hard by selling on Tuesday, as Amazon.com set out to borrow another $25 billion in new debt.
content: Bonds financing the massive artificial-intelligence buildout were hit hard by selling on Tuesday, as Amazon.com set out to borrow another $25 billion in new debt.
chineseTitle: 亚马逊寻求再借 250 亿美元，与 AI 相关的债务大幅抛售
chineseSummary: 周二，亚马逊计划再借入 250 亿美元的新债，为大规模人工智能建设提供融资的债券受到抛售的严重打击。
chineseContent: 周二，亚马逊计划再借入 250 亿美元的新债，为大规模人工智能建设提供融资的债券受到抛售的严重打击。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
